name: Shyvana Jungle Build Guide – Handcrafted Challenger Insights
snippet: Although Shyvana technically has an AP build you could run, it really isn't worth it. Your AD build is simply better in most games, and even if you need some more magic damage on your team, there's a couple of ways you can itemize to have a good mix of damage anyway.
